title: THRIFT STORE - 211info
text: OPPORTUNITY FOUNDATION THRIFT STORE REDMOND THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers low-cost clothing, furniture, household items, appliances, books, and videos. Accepts donations including large furniture. 3294 S Highway 97 Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Monday 9am-3pm, Tuesday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donation: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-3pm Email (541) 548-5288 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 548-5288 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Store: Walk in Donation: Drop off or call to schedule pick-up within city limits. Visit website to see list of accepted items. FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties Services: Clothing Donation Programs Donation Pickups Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
